---
title: "03. 平行、公理门槛与整体一致性"
subtitle: "Parallelism, Axiom Thresholds, and Global Coherence"
date: 2026-04-09
order: 3
categories: [elements, cultural, omega]
description: "How parallelism exposes the threshold between local incidence data and globally coherent geometry."
---

**Books:** Book I, VI  
**Omega Directions:** `modular tower inverse limit`, `spectral theory`, `rate-distortion information theory`

{{< include articles/category_03_parallelism_axiom_thresholds_and_global_coherence.md >}}

---

[Back to Elements Index](index.qmd) | [Back to Cultural Track](../index.qmd)
